Accessibility

For Everyone

Last updated: December 2024

Our Commitment

Ferni is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We continually improve the user experience for everyone and apply relevant accessibility standards.

Accessibility Features

  • Voice-First Interface: Ferni is designed primarily for voice interaction, making it accessible to users who cannot use traditional screen interfaces.
  • Phone Access: Call Ferni directly at 1 (484) 481-3081—no app download or visual interface required.
  • Screen Reader Support: Our web interface is designed to work with screen readers and assistive technologies.
  • Keyboard Navigation: Full keyboard navigation support throughout the web application.
  • High Contrast: Our design uses high-contrast colors that meet WCAG AA standards.
  • Resizable Text: All text can be resized up to 200% without loss of functionality.

Standards

We aim to conform to the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1, Level AA. These guidelines explain how to make web content more accessible for people with disabilities.

Feedback

We welcome your feedback on the accessibility of Ferni. Please let us know if you encounter accessibility barriers:

  • Email: accessibility@ferni.ai
  • Phone: 1 (484) 481-3081

We try to respond to accessibility feedback within 5 business days.

Continuous Improvement

We are always looking for ways to improve. If you have suggestions for how we can improve accessibility, please contact us.

Ferni

The AI that actually listens. Six specialists, one conversation, infinite memory.

Privacy Terms Cookie Accessibility

We value your privacy

We use cookies to enhance your experience and analyze site traffic. Learn more

Cookie Preferences

Essential Cookies

Required for the website to function. Cannot be disabled.

Analytics Cookies

Help us understand how visitors interact with our website.

Functional Cookies

Remember your preferences and settings.
